qa_pairs.question: What kind of error have some users reported from the Nextflow main process?
qa_pairs.answer: Some users have reported getting a `SIGBUS` error from the Nextflow main process.

qa_pairs.question: How can one resolve the `SIGBUS` error when executing Nextflow?
qa_pairs.answer: Setting the environment variable `NXF_OPTS="-Dleveldb.mmap=false"` when executing `nextflow` is reported to solve the `SIGBUS` error.

qa_pairs.question: Are there specific Nextflow issues that the `SIGBUS` error is thought to be connected with?
qa_pairs.answer: Yes, the `SIGBUS` error is suspected to be connected with Nextflow issues #842 (https://github.com/nextflow-io/nextflow/issues/842) and #2774 (https://github.com/nextflow-io/nextflow/issues/2774).
